items.title: The first 70-point half in Fever history. They set a new franchise record with 70 points in a half. (Previous: 64, 7/13/25 v DAL.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
The first 70-point half in Fever history. They set a new franchise record with 70 points in a half. (Previous: 64, 7/13/25 v DAL.

They average a league-high 94.4ppg.

Fever shot 63%, including 8/15 from deep, and lead the Sun 70-46. Clark has 21/7a, Mitchell with 16.

items.title: Kelsey Mitchell, mid play on offense, wasn't happy to not get a foul call coming around a screen. Diamond Miller bumped her, and Mitchell had words for an official. Mitchell fouls Miller on the defensive end before hitting a buzzer beater to end the half. It's 70-46 Fever.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: Kelsey Mitchell, mid play on offense, wasn't happy to not get a foul call coming around a screen. Diamond Miller bumped her, and Mitchell had words for an official. Mitchell fouls Miller on the defensive end before hitting a buzzer beater to end the half. It's 70-46 Fever.
